---
title: "The Rev. John Eyre Yonge"
---

## The Rev. John Eyre Yonge

**Dates:** (1818-1890)

### Description

cousin of CMY

### Biography

Son of the Rev. Charles Yonge, he was a master at Eton,  locum tenens in Otterbourne in 1872.  He married (19 Dec 1844) the Hon. Catherine Charlotte Lysaght (1822-1905).  He was father of Elizabeth Catherine and of Charlotte Fortescue Yonge.

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 17th [1897]
- Letter from July 28th [1893?]
- Letter from March 20th 1876
- Letter from 14 May 1872

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
